title: Senior Investment Banker at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India
company: AU Small Finance Bank Capital India

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at AU Small Finance Bank Capital India
jsonLd.description:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AU Small Finance Bank Capital India:
AU Small Finance Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AU Small Finance Bank Capital India!
